{{Quote|He's a no-talent bag of bantha droppings.|[[Garik Loran|Garik "Face" Loran]]|<ref name="X-Wing: Solo Command">''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]''</ref>}}
'''Tetran Cowall''' was [[Garik Loran|Garik "Face" Loran's]] rival when "Face" still made [[Holodrama/Legends|holodramas]].

==Biography==
[[File:Tetran_Cowall_TIE_Interceptor_XWM.png|thumb|left|200px|Cowall's TIE interceptor impersonating Soontir Fel]]
Tetran Cowall was in ''[[High Winds]]'', a drama about [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] tightrope walkers. Later in his career, Cowall began to find little work. He eventually joined [[Zsinj]] as an impostor of [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]], leading a [[Zsinj's impostor 181st Imperial Fighter Group|false]] [[181st Imperial Fighter Wing/Legends|181st]] in an attempt by Zsinj to trap [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] in an ambush. Loran described Cowall as having "no perceivable acting skills", though his portrayal of Fel was convincing enough to fool even [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], who knew the Baron personally. After his [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|Interceptor]] was shot down in the [[Battle of Selaggis]], Cowall was left on the surface of the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Selcaron]] by Antilles, and was presumably taken prisoner by the New Republic shortly afterwards.

{{Char-stub}}
